description: A compiled expression token used in COMPARE_EXPRESSION arrays (arrExpLeft / arrExpRight). Each token is an opcode/operand pair.
notes: TaskExpressionArr is typedef'd as abase::vector<TASK_EXPRESSION> = 16 bytes in the fixed struct.
The _cur_size field of the vector (at vector_base + 12) gives the element count stored in the binary.
The actual array data follows inline in the variable section after the owning COMPARE_EXPRESSION's strings are read.
In practice, arrExpLeft and arrExpRight data in the variable section is not parsed by the PHP reader (only the strings are needed for display).
